## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Impact

Describe user, API, compatibility, security, packaging, or deployment impact. Write "None" when a category does not apply.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run scan:security`
- [ ] `npm audit`
- [ ] `npm run package:smoke`
- [ ] Relevant site, skill, Chrome, or Firefox builds were run

## Review checklist

- [ ] The branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] Dependency and lockfile changes are intentional
- [ ] Security-sensitive details are not disclosed publicly
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior or contributor workflow changed
